summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM Pre-Sales to Sales transfer workflow, dashboard features, date filters, and HR Portal features. All core features working correctly.

presales_to_sales_transfer.details: Created Pre-Sales lead 'TEST_Transfer_Lead_abc123', moved to 'Appointment Booked' stage, successfully transferred to Sales 'New Appointment' stage (lead_be608c48b9ec). Transfer includes appointment details and 'From Pre-Sales' badge.

presales_dashboard.details: Pre-Sales dashboard shows 913 total leads with correct stage counts: New Lead (904), Contacted (0), RNR (0), New RNR Leads (0), Portfolio sent (0), Follow-up (2), Appointment Booked (7)

sales_dashboard.details: Sales dashboard shows 17 total leads with stages: New Appointment (6), Follow-up (2), Discussion (1), Site Visit (0), Site Visit Client Land (1), Site Visit Our Projects (0)

presales_date_filter.details: Pre-Sales date filter shows 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder (empty) - NOT defaulting to today. All leads visible without date filter.

sales_date_filter.details: Sales date filter shows 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder (empty) - NOT defaulting to today. All leads visible without date filter.

presales_leads_unassigned.details: Pre-Sales leads endpoint returns 500 leads including unassigned leads (verified via API)

sales_leads_unassigned.details: Sales leads endpoint returns leads including unassigned leads (verified via API)

migrate_stages_endpoint.details: POST /api/crm/migrate-stages endpoint works correctly - adds missing stages and fixes is_final flag

hr_portal_employees_tab.details: HR Portal Employees tab shows 'Active Employees (0)' and 'Left Employees (0)' toggle buttons with sort filter 'Name (A to Z)'

hr_portal_add_employee_dialog.details: Add Employee dialog has tabs: Personal, Employment, ID & Docs, Address & Emergency, Salary & Bank. Department and Designation dropdowns available in Employment tab.

hr_portal_settings_sync_key.details: HR Portal Settings tab shows 'Biometric Sync Key (eSSL)' section with 'Generate Sync Key' and 'Revoke Existing Key' buttons, plus 7-step setup instructions

crm_stages_configuration.details: Pre-Sales stages include: New Lead, Contacted, RNR, New RNR Leads, Portfolio sent, Follow-up, Appointment Booked (is_final=true). Sales stages include: New Appointment, Follow-up, Discussion, Site Visit, etc.

seed_data_creation: Created test lead 'TEST_Transfer_Lead_abc123' which was transferred to Sales as 'lead_be608c48b9ec'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRM Pre-Sales to Sales transfer features working correctly. Date filters no longer default to today. Unassigned leads are visible in both Pre-Sales and Sales dashboards. HR Portal has Active/Left Employees toggle, Department/Designation dropdowns, and Biometric Sync Key section for Super Admin.
features_tested: Pre-Sales → Sales transfer: Create lead, move to 'Appointment Booked', verify in Sales 'New Appointment' stage
Pre-Sales dashboard shows correct stage counts including unassigned leads
Sales dashboard shows correct stage counts including unassigned leads
Sales leads endpoint returns leads for sales user including unassigned
Pre-Sales leads endpoint returns leads for pre_sales user including unassigned
Date filter NOT defaulting to today (empty by default)
HR Portal: Employees tab shows 'Active Employees' and 'Left Employees' toggle with sort filters
HR Portal: Add Employee dialog has Department dropdown (9 items) and Designation dropdown
HR Portal: Settings tab shows 'Biometric Sync Key' section for Super Admin
Migration endpoint POST /api/crm/migrate-stages adds missing stages
